item.title: Wuthering Waves 3.3 Livestream Time & Codes
item.description:
Wuthering Waves 3.3 special program will air on April 17, 2026, at 07:00 AM ET (UTC-4) . The livestream will begin on April 17 everywhere, but the precise hour will change based on your own time zone. Additionally, three WuWa 3.3 codes will also be available, which you can exchange for 300 Astrites.

WuWa 3.3 Livestream Code (Wuthering Waves 3.3 Livestream)

As always, WuWa 3.3 livestream codes will provide 300 Astrite after redemption.

WuWa 3.3 Livestream Codes

Reward

[TBA]

  • 100 Astrite
  • [TBA]

[TBA]

  • 100 Astrite
  • [TBA]

[TBA]

  • 100 Astrite
  • [TBA]

Other Codes

WUTHERINGGIFT

  • 50 Astrite
  • 2 Premium Resonance Potion
  • 2 Medium Energy Bag
  • 2 Medium Revival Inhaler
  • 1k Shell Credit

WUWA4PC (PC only)

  • 50 Astrite
  • 20k Shell Credit

WuWa 3.3 Livestream Date & Time (Wuthering Waves 3.3)

Here's a list of WuWa 3.3 livestream times for different locations in the world.

item.title: 37 RPGs With The Most Romance Options
item.description:
For some gamers, romance is an integral part of any RPG experience. In the midst of saving the world, grinding out enemies, chasing down better gear, and leveling up, some players feel the need to find that special someone for their characters. For many, it's an important part of role-playing within the world of the game.

Many of the more modern RPGs have embraced romance and given players a number of NPCs for their characters to woo. Here are some RPGs that have the most options when it comes to courtship, marriage, or just casual flings.

Updated on April 16, 2026, by Hamza Haq: For a lot of RPG fans, being able to romance interesting characters is one of the biggest reasons why they’re interested in the genre in the first place. The more characters there are for players to invest time and effort into wooing, the more the replayability value increases. This article has been updated with two additional games that offer multiple romance options for players to enjoy.

37 Cyberpunk 2077

Every Character Feels Real and Disparate to One Another

Cyberpunk 2077
6 /10
Released
December 10, 2020

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
CD Projekt Red
Franchise
Cyberpunk
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch 2, PC
Genre(s)
RPG, Action
OpenCritic Rating
Strong
6 Images
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 6

The world of Cyberpunk 2077 is rife with danger, dystopias, and enemies gunning to take V's head. Following a mission gone awry, the main character code-named V gets a chip stuck in their head that seems to contain the personality and memories of a dead musician, Johnny Silverhand, and this virtual ghost is intent on rewriting all of V's memories and taking them over, leaving them only weeks to find a way to stop it.

Night City is filled to the brim with missions to complete, cyberpsychos to hunt down, and people to meet, some of whom, such as Judy, Panam, River, Kerry, and a few extras, can even be romanced. The Night City is also home to Joy Toys for players who may be feeling a little lonely but don't want anything too serious.

36 Yakuza: Like A Dragon

Romancing Can Be Tough But Rewarding

Yakuza: Like A Dragon
Released
November 10, 2020

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio
Franchise
Yakuza
Platform(s)
PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S
Genre(s)
JRPG
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 6

Yakuza: Like A Dragon is an AAA title with romance options that could benefit the player at the end. Players will explore their family's past, grow in the ranks, and take some much-needed downtime doing various activities, like dating. With six options, players will have to develop a certain aspect of personality, as well as offer gifts to romance certain women.

Each character is different and is interested in certain personality quirks, so players should look ahead at what they should work on when pursuing. Once players reach a certain bond with these characters, they'll receive rewards that could help them in the future. They also have the chance to date every character to receive the best rewards.

35 Baldur's Gate 3

All Romantic Choices Are Fantastically Written and Diverse

Baldur's Gate 3
9 /10
Released
August 3, 2023

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Developer(s)
Larian Studios
Franchise
Baldur's Gate
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, PC, macOS
Genre(s)
RPG
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 6

Larian's hit D&D -themed RPG is a fantastic example of the famed tabletop game in video game form, following the story of the player character and their companions who have been infected by a mind flayer parasite that will transform them unless they find someone capable of removing it. Traveling with a party of companions guarantees bonds will deepen, and said connections might even flourish beyond friendship.

Even though Baldur's Gate 3 only has six romance options, it's still a well-diverse, great list of characters that can be romanced. Like most of the RPGs listed, all characters have a specific list of needs that need to be met in order to gain a relationship. And like more of the recent releases of RPGs, these characters are all romance options, no matter which gender the player is.

34 Persona 3 Reload

Players Need to Devote Time to Form Romantic Bonds

Persona 3 Reload
9 /10
Released
February 2, 2024

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Developer(s)
P-Studio
Franchise
Persona
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch 2, PC
Genre(s)
JRPG, RPG, Life Simulation, Strategy
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 6, Possibly 7

The rerelease of Persona 3 Reload changed many things, adding new mechanics while tweaking old ones. But the roster of characters never altered, and neither did the romance options players had the pick of.

In order to woo the lady of their choice, players would need to spend time with them to increase their Social Link while choosing the right dialogue options. Even the Velvet Room guide Elizabeth could be 'romanced' in a way, but she would not become the protagonist's girlfriend in quite the same way as the others. Nevertheless, each pick provides a different sort of romance, as every character has a unique personality, with different prerequisites.

33 Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous

All Love Interests Are Vastly Different With Branching Storylines

Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous
8 /10
Released
September 2, 2021

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Genre(s)
RPG
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 7

Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous is a highly celebrated top-down CRPG that offers players a lengthy 100+ hour campaign, tons of build variety, and layers upon layers of complex systems stacked atop one another. Companions join the party over the course of the story through various methods. In addition to being allies that help in combat, some of these companions can also be love interests, depending on what decisions the player makes.

In total, there are seven potential romantic partners in Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous : six of them are recruitable companions, and one of them is an important NPC that players encounter during the story. Initiating romance requires earning favorability with the chosen partner through actions and completed quests. Provided players fulfill the prerequisites, romance unfolds over the course of the playthrough, with multiple branching paths that have vastly different endings depending on the choices made.

32 The Witcher 3

Players Have the Choice of Devoting Their Love or Playing the Field

The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
9 /10
Released
May 19, 2015

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
CD Projekt Red
Franchise
The Witcher
Platform(s)
Nintendo Switch, PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S
Genre(s)
RPG, Action, Adventure
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 7

The Witcher 3 might be surprising to see on this list due to there only being two well-known romance options; however, there are five minor characters who Geralt can romance that have no effect on the choice of either picking Triss Merigold or rekindling the love with Yennefer of Vengeberg.

Granted, players can even choose an eighth option if Geralt ventures into the Brothels to enjoy some added company along his journey. However, whether players want to enjoy their time with several ladies or just stay loyal to the one, it's completely up to them.

31 Divinity: Original Sin 2

Realistic Romance Routes, With Players Needing to Prove Their Worth

Divinity: Original Sin 2
Released
September 14, 2017

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Developer(s)
Larian Studios
Franchise
Divinity
Platform(s)
Switch, PS4, Xbox One, PC
Genre(s)
RPG
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 7

Divinity Original Sin 2 is a top-selling RPG game on Steam with several diverse romance options for players to choose from. While there is an option for players to experience the journey on their own, it's always nice to have someone beside them as they traverse the world.

Players who wish to romance these characters will need to focus on their storyline and try to grow a friendship and relationship with them, so it's best to see what is required to romance them.

30 Dragon Age: The Veilguard

All Companions Are Romanceable Regardless of Gender or Race

Dragon Age: The Veilguard
10 /10
Released
October 31, 2024

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL

Developer(s)
BioWare
Franchise
Dragon Age
Platform(s)
PC, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series S, Xbox Series X
Genre(s)
RPG
OpenCritic Rating
Strong
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 7

Romance is a staple component of any BioWare game, and this holds true in the fourth installment in the Dragon Age series, Dragon Age: The Veilguard . Set after the events of Inquisition , and subsequently Trespasser , Rook stitches together a rag-tag group to put a stop to the machinations of two elven gods who are trying to infect all of Thedas with the Blight.

In between fights for their lives, Rook can hop on back to the Lighthouse and spend some time getting to know the various companions, getting even closer to one of them if they wish. With seven disparate and intriguing romances, players will be spoiled for choice when selecting their chosen paramour.

29 Baldur's Gate 2: Enhanced Edition

Find Love Among The Companions

Baldur's Gate 2: Enhanced Edition
Released
November 15, 2013

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Developer(s)
Overhaul Games
Franchise
Baldur's Gate
Platform(s)
Android, iOS, PC, Switch, PS4, Xbox One
Genre(s)
RPG
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 8

The first BioWare game to delve into romance, BioWare did so wholeheartedly with Baldur's Gate 2 . In a world fraught with danger and various factions levying their power for good or otherwise, not to mention the evil mage serving as the main antagonist, the player character can still make the time to woo their traveling companions if they wish to do so.

The original game consisted of only four romanceable companions, but the Enhanced Edition included a further four eligible bachelors and bachelorettes players could court while facing off against the dangers in the world. But there are some gender and race exclusions for certain characters. For example, players wanting to romance Jaheira must be a male human, elf, half-elf or halfling, something to take into consideration if the player's eye falls on someone in particular.

28 Warhammer 40K: Rogue Trader

Romanceable Companions Worth Investing Time Into

Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader
Released
December 7, 2023

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL

Genre(s)
Strategy, RPG
Powered by
  • Number of Romances: 8

Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader is a CRPG developed by Owlcat Games that prides itself on its fleshed-out companions with distinct personalities, believable motivations, and unique perspectives that play a significant role in making the experience more enjoyable.

Players can romance five companions in Warhammer 40K: Rogue Trade r’s base game, namely Cassia, Heinrix, Jae, Marazhai, and Yrliet, as well as a non-playable character called Jocasta Sauerback. Two additional romanceable companions were added later through expansions: Solomone Anthar in the Lex Imperialis DLC and Kibellah in the Void Shadows DLC. The romances in Rogue Trader are fully fleshed out, with a flirting phase, courting gestures, and special dialogue that all culminate in intimate moments worth working toward.

item.title: New Luigi's Mansion Switch 2 Game Leaked
item.description:
This article was updated by Andrea Trama on April 16, 2026, with mention of all the Luigi's Mansion games, their release platforms, and their release years. It was first published on April 8.

According to a new leak from Shpeshal Nick, Nintendo could be working on a brand-new Luigi's Mansion game for the Nintendo Switch 2. The same leaker has also claimed that a Luigi's Mansion movie is being pitched at Nintendo, and that a new Luigi's Mansion Amiibo is currently in the works.

The Luigi's Mansion series made its debut all the way back in 2001 as a Nintendo GameCube exclusive. This spectral Super Mario spinoff saw players assume the role of the green-colored plumber as he clears a mansion of its ghostly inhabitants. Though the series didn't debut to universal acclaim, it quickly became the GameCube's most successful launch title. Luigi's Mansion eventually received a sequel in 2013 for the Nintendo 3DS, which generally performed much better with critics, and in 2019 the third Luigi's Mansion entry hit the Nintendo Switch. This most recent Luigi's Mansion title earned an impressive Top Critic Average of 85 on OpenCritic, and as of March 2024, it's believed to have sold over 14 million copies.

Rumor: Luigi's Mansion 4 Could Be in Development

On April 7, leaker Shpeshal Nick retweeted a recent X post from Global Box Office that stated The Super Mario Galaxy Movie had crossed the $400 million mark at the global box office, and that it's now tracking to hit $750 million by this coming weekend. Shpeshal Nick's retweet came with the caption, "The success of the Mario movies must be having quite the impact within Nintendo. A lot of stuff in the works from what I’m hearing, I can’t talk about it all just yet, but as an example, they’re looking at pitching a Luigi’s Mansion movie."

Here is a list of Luigi's Mansion games so far:

  • Luigi's Mansion - GameCube, 2001
  • Luigi's Mansion: Dark Moon - Nintendo 3DS, 2013
  • Luigi's Mansion Arcade - Japanese arcades, 2015
  • Luigi's Mansion - Remake, Nintendo 3DS, 2018
  • Luigi's Mansion 3 - Nintendo Switch, 2019
  • Luigi's Mansion 2 HD - Nintendo Switch, 2024

Soon after, the Global Box Office X account made a post based on Shpeshal Nick's retweet, stating that Nintendo is currently pitching a Luigi's Mansion movie. In the replies to this post, X user @The_Joker claimed that fans want a new Luigi's Mansion game, not a movie. Shpeshal Nick replied to this comment, claiming that a new Luigi's Mansion game is in development as far as they know, and that while they "have a very small amount of info on it," a tie-in Luigi's Mansion Amiibo is also believed to be in the works at Nintendo. At this time, Shpeshal Nick hasn't shared any gameplay details or a potential release window for this rumored new Luigi's Mansion game.

Leaks Claim That Nintendo Switch 2 Has a Big Year Ahead

This Luigi's Mansion 4 rumor is just the latest in a long line of recent Nintendo-related leaks. Towards the end of last month, leaker NateTheHate claimed that a brand-new Star Fox game could be releasing as early as summer this year. This new Star Fox game could allegedly be joined by a Switch 2 Edition of Nintendo Switch Sports and possibly a Switch 2 Edition of Pikmin 4 .

Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.

Your Order

Results

—

—

—

More Games
Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.
Easy (5)Medium (7)Hard (10)

Your Order

Results

—
— —
More Games

On top of these potential summer Nintendo Switch 2 releases, NateTheHate recently claimed that the long-rumored Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake is real and that it'll be hitting the Switch 2 towards the end of 2026. A new 3D Super Mario game is also rumored to be in the works, though it might not appear until 2027. Of course, all rumors and leaks should always be taken with a hefty pinch of salt.

Luigi's Mansion

Follow
Followed
Adventure
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Top Critic Avg: 75 /100 Critics Rec: 53%
Released
November 18, 2001
ESRB
E For Everyone due to Mild Cartoon Violence
Developer(s)
Grezzo
Publisher(s)
Nintendo

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Genre(s)
Adventure
Powered by

item.title: Elder Scrolls Fans Are Using Starfield to Figure Out What ES6's Hammerfell Might Look Like
item.description:
The Elder Scrolls 6 is still nowhere in sight, and fans of Bethesda's beloved fantasy series have been using the developer's most recent game, Starfield , to try to predict what Hammerfell could look like. This summer will mark eight years since The Elder Scrolls 6 was first announced, and the game has been shrouded in mystery ever since.

In the past eight years, Bethesda has released Starfield , and Amazon has turned Fallout into an incredibly successful live-action TV series. Starfield launched back in 2023, and while the project was ambitious, it has struggled to hold the same magic that The Elder Scrolls and Fallout have managed. A lot of gamers are desperate for The Elder Scrolls 6 news, but Bethesda has remained incredibly tight-lipped about how far along the project actually is. The game's setting hasn't even been confirmed, but that hasn't stopped fans from theorizing that Hammerfell will be the next chapter's main location.

Gamers Eagerly Waiting for The Elder Scrolls 6 Are Using Starfield to Predict Possible Hammerfell Landscapes

Reddit user sirferrell went to The Elder Scrolls 6 subreddit to share a few Starfield screenshots that they believe could resemble what Hammerfell might look like. In-game shots of craggy mountains covered in red sand, bodies of water lined by palm trees, and dry deserts make up the slideshow. This makes sense, considering that Hammerfell features a blend of desert regions and tropical locations. It has a very Mediterranean vibe, and it could make for a really diverse Elder Scrolls 6 map.

Using Starfield as a way to get an idea of what Hammerfell could look like makes sense. Starfield was built with Bethesda's Creation Engine 2, and with The Elder Scrolls 6 using Creation Engine 3, the space adventure will be more similar graphically than the likes of Skyrim or Fallout 4 . This slideshow has generated mixed feelings from some fellow fans. Many in the comments have voiced their opinions that they hope The Elder Scrolls 6 looks a lot better than Starfield , while others have noted that the sci-fi RPG is the best-looking game that Bethesda has made yet. Creation Engine 2 was a big leap forward for the developer, so it's going to be interesting to see how much further Creation Engine 3 takes its visuals.

Despite theories, it's also important to remember that Bethesda hasn't confirmed that The Elder Scrolls 6 will be set in Hammerfell. The next chapter could end up surprising everyone, so only time will tell if these Starfield screenshots are an accurate representation of The Elder Scrolls 6 's location.

Find all 10 pairs

Results

0
—
More Games
Find all 10 pairs
Regular Cover ArtClean Cover Art
Results
0
—
More Games

Gamers Are Hoping This is the Year That Brings Fresh ES6 News

The next Xbox Games Showcase has some Elder Scrolls fans hopeful that another trailer will be revealed, but this might be wishful thinking. Almost every time there is a new Xbox event now, The Elder Scrolls 6 inevitably gets brought up. Of course, nothing is impossible. Current speculation is predicting that The Elder Scrolls 6 's release target could be anywhere between 2027 and 2028, and Bethesda is probably going to be very careful to avoid making an announcement too soon again.

10 /10

Starfield

Follow
Followed
Action
RPG
Open-World
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Top Critic Avg: 85 /100 Critics Rec: 83%
Released
September 6, 2023
ESRB
M For Mature 17+ / Blood, Suggestive Themes, Use of Drugs, Strong Language, Violence, In-Game Purchases
Developer(s)
Bethesda
Publisher(s)
Bethesda
8 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Starfield is the first new universe in over 25 years from Bethesda Game Studios, the award-winning creators of The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim and Fallout 4. In this next generation role-playing game set amongst the stars, create any character you want and explore with unparalleled freedom as you embark on an epic journey to answer humanity’s greatest mystery.

In the year 2330, humanity has ventured beyond our solar system, settling new planets, and living as a spacefaring people. You will join Constellation – the last group of space explorers seeking rare artifacts throughout the galaxy – and navigate the vast expanse of space in Bethesda Game Studios’ biggest and most ambitious game.

Tell Your story - In Starfield the most important story is the one you tell with your character. Start your journey by customizing your appearance and deciding your Background and Traits. Will you be an experienced explorer, a charming diplomat, a stealthy cyber runner, or something else entirely? The choice is yours. Decide who you will be and what you will become.

Explore Outer Space - Venture through the stars and explore more than 1000 planets. Navigate bustling cities, explore dangerous bases, and traverse wild landscapes. Meet and recruit a memorable cast of characters, join in the adventures of various factions, and embark on quests across the Settled Systems. A new story or experience is always waiting to be discovered.

Captain the Ship Of Your Dreams - Pilot and command the ship of your dreams. Personalize the look of your ship, modify critical systems including weapons and shields, and assign crew members to provide unique bonuses. In deep space you will engage in high-stakes dogfights, encounter random missions, dock at star stations, and even board and commandeer enemy ships to add to your collection.

Discover, Collect, Build - Explore planets and discover the fauna, flora, and resources needed to craft everything from medicine and food to equipment and weapons. Build outposts and hire a crew to passively extract materials and establish cargo links to transfer resources between them. Invest these raw materials into research projects to unlock unique crafting recipes.

Lock and Load - Space can be a dangerous place. A refined combat system gives you the tools to deal with any situation. Whether you prefer long-range rifles, laser weapons, or demolitions, each weapon type can be modified to complement your playstyle. Zero G environments add a chaotic spectacle to combat, while boost packs give players freedom to maneuver like never before.

Number of Players
Single-player
Steam Deck Compatibility
Unsupported
PC Release Date
September 6, 2023
Xbox Series X|S Release Date
September 6, 2023
PS5 Release Date
April 7, 2026
Genre(s)
Action, RPG, Open-World
Platform(s)
Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, PC, PlayStation 5
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
How Long To Beat
24 hours
X|S Optimized
Yes
File Size Xbox Series
149.86 GB
Wiki

Fextralife Wiki

Powered by

item.title: All Fortnite Save the World Twitch Drop Rewards (Free Hero & More)
item.description:
Fortnite Save the World has finally gone free to play with the launch of Act II of Fortnite Showdown, opening up a brand-new experience for players to jump into. In this story-driven adventure, players will join the fight against the storm, grind for Schematics and new Heroes, and take on a variety of missions. To celebrate Save the World going free to play, Fortnite has teamed up with Twitch to offer players new rewards. Here are all the Save the World Twitch Drop rewards and how to get them.

Epic Games are currently investigating an issue with the Twitch Drop rewards not being distributed to players and are working on a fix. If you find yourself not receiving your items after fulfilling the watch time requirements, this is why.

All Fortnite Save the World Twitch Drop Rewards

With Fortnite Save the World going free to play, players can earn a total of three rewards for free by watching eligible streams on Twitch. Before you can claim them, however, if you have not done so already, be sure to link both your Twitch and Epic Games accounts. This can be done by completing the following steps:

  1. Head to the Epic Games website and go to Linked Accounts within your Account Settings.
  2. Find the Twitch icon and select the Link option.
  3. Sign in to your Twitch account and follow the on-screen instructions to link the two together.

Once your Epic Games and Twitch Accounts are linked, you can go ahead and start unlocking your Twitch Drop rewards. These rewards are all earnable via watching Streams in the Fortnite Category that have Drops enabled. Watching for a specific length of time will award you two sprays , usable in Battle Royale, and a Save the World Hero, usable only in Save the World. Here is a rundown of how to unlock each reward:

  • Save the World Mood Spray: Watch for 30 minutes
  • Storm Chasers Spray: Watch for 1 hour
  • Urban Assault Headhunter Hero (Save the World exclusive Hero): Watch for 4 hours

Upon meeting the requirements above, you can then claim each of your rewards via your Drops Inventory. Doing so will award each item inside of Fortnite , usually right away. However, in specific circumstances, this may take longer. All Twitch Drop rewards for Save the World are earnable from now until Apr 21 at 12 AM. Rewards earned are also eligible to be claimed until April 28.

Fortnite
Released
September 26, 2017

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

ESRB
T for Teen - Diverse Content: Discretion Advised, In-Game Purchases, Users Interact
Developer(s)
Epic Games
Genre(s)
Survival, Battle Royale, Shooter, Action, Adventure
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PC, Android, iOS
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
Powered by
